Your account

Settings

Account details Password and security Privacy Preferences Signature Connected accounts Following Ignoring Delete account Log out
  • If the selected style includes a collapsible sidebar, this will collapse the sidebar on all pages by default.
  • If the selected style includes a collapsible side navigation, this will collapse the side navigation on all pages by default.
  • If the selected style includes a collapsible postbit, this will show the postbit on all posts by default.
  • Receive email when a new conversation message is received
      • Once you have received an email notifying you of a conversation message, you will not receive any further emails about that conversation until you have read the new messages.
This will allow you to change the way conversation list will appear.
  • This will allow other people to see when you are online.
      • This will allow other people to see what page you are currently viewing.
The number of posts showing in page. This only applied to viewing thread detail page.
Hide the Featured Games slider on the homepage
  • Any notices you have previously dismissed will be restored to view if you check this option.

Search Options

The search order to use for quick searches, searching by thread, and the default value when loading the search form.

Alerts page and summary settings

  • Viewing the alerts pop-up will not mark alerts as read
  • Viewing the alerts page will not mark alerts as read
  • Viewing the alerts page will not summarize alerts
Summarize similar alerts with numbers greater than
  • If enabled, you will be alerted/emailed (based on your settings) for every post in a watched thread as long as you have no unread alerts for that thread. If disabled, you'll only be alerted for new posts since the last time you viewed the thread.
